---
title: "CoTRA Bulk RNA-seq Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
params:
  bulk: NULL
  de: NULL
  annot: NULL
  enrich: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(enrichplot)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(fgsea)
library(ReactomePA)

bulk  <- params$bulk
de    <- params$de
annot <- params$annot
enr   <- params$enrich
```

# 1. Overview

This report summarizes bulk RNA-seq analysis performed in the CoTRA pipeline.

---

# 2. Sample Metadata

```{r}
if (!is.null(bulk) && !is.null(bulk$coldata)) {
  kable(bulk$coldata, caption = "Sample metadata") %>% 
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
} else {
  "No metadata available."
}
```

# 3. Counts Summary

```{r}
if (!is.null(bulk) && !is.null(bulk$counts)) {
  df <- bulk$counts
  kable(head(df, 20), caption = "First 20 genes in count matrix") %>% 
    kable_styling(font_size = 9)
} else {
  "No count matrix available."
}
```

# 4. Differential Expression Results

```{r}
if (!is.null(de)) {
  de_top <- de %>% arrange(padj) %>% head(50)
  kable(de_top, caption = "Top 50 differentially expressed genes") %>%
    kable_styling(font_size = 9)
} else {
  "No DE results found."
}
```

# 4.1 Volcano Plot

```{r fig.width=7 fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(de) && all(c("log2FoldChange","padj") %in% colnames(de))) {
  p <- ggplot(de, aes(log2FoldChange, -log10(padj))) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=c(-1,1), linetype="dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed") +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle("Volcano Plot")
  print(p)
} else {
  "Volcano cannot be generated."
}
```

# 4.2 MA Plot

```{r fig.width=7 fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(de) && all(c("baseMean","log2FoldChange") %in% colnames(de))) {
  p <- ggplot(de, aes(baseMean, log2FoldChange)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle("MA Plot")
  print(p)
} else {
  "MA plot cannot be generated."
}
```

# 5. Annotation Results

```{r}
if (!is.null(annot)) {
  kable(head(annot, 20), caption = "Top annotated DE results") %>%
    kable_styling(font_size = 9)
} else {
  "No annotation results available."
}
```

# 6. GSEA Results

```{r}
if (!is.null(enr$gsea)) {
  gsea_df <- enr$gsea()
  kable(head(gsea_df, 20), caption = "Top GSEA pathways") %>%
    kable_styling(font_size = 9)
} else {
  "No GSEA results available."
}
```

# 7. Overrepresentation Analysis (GO / KEGG)

```{r}
if (!is.null(enr$ora)) {
  all <- lapply(names(enr$ora), function(nm) {
    df <- as.data.frame(enr$ora[[nm]])
    df$Type <- nm
    df
  })
  all <- do.call(rbind, all)
  kable(head(all, 20), caption = "ORA results") %>%
    kable_styling(font_size = 9)
} else {
  "No ORA results available."
}
```

# 8. Reactome Pathway Analysis

```{r}
if (!is.null(enr$reactome)) {
  df <- as.data.frame(enr$reactome())
  kable(head(df, 20), caption = "Reactome enriched pathways") %>%
    kable_styling(font_size = 9)
} else {
  "No Reactome data."
}
```

# 9. Network Plot

```{r fig.width=7 fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(enr$ora)) {
  obj <- enr$ora$GO_BP
  if (!is.null(obj)) {
    try(print(cnetplot(obj, showCategory = 10)), silent = TRUE)
  }
}
```

# 10. Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
